array_types.name: Digest_T
array_types.code: type Digest_T is array (Digest_Index_T range <>) of Octets.T;

array_types.name: Key_T
array_types.code: type Key_T is array (Key_Index_T range <>) of Octets.T;

subtypes.name: Digest_Index_T
subtypes.code:
subtype Digest_Index_T is Positive
  range Positive'First .. Digest_Length_Default;

subtypes.name: Key_Index_T
subtypes.code:
subtype Key_Index_T is Positive
  range Positive'First .. Key_Length_Default;

subprograms.name: Digest_Length_Of
subprograms.code: function Digest_Length_Of (Context : in T) return Digest_Index_T

subprograms.name: Finalize
subprograms.code:
procedure Finalize (Context : in out T;
                    Digest  :    out Digest_T)

subprograms.name: Hash
Hash_Flex

documentation.description:
# derives Digest from Digest_Length,
#                     Message,
#                     Message_First,
#                     Message_Last;
# pre Digest'First = Digest_Index_T'First and
#     Digest_Length <= Digest'Length and
#     Message_First in Message'Range and
#     Message_Last <= Message'Last;

subprograms.name: Hash_Keyed
Hash_Keyed_Flex

documentation.description:
# derives Digest from Digest_Length,
#                     Key,
#                     Key_Length,
#                     Message,
#                     Message_First,
#                     Message_Last;
# pre Digest'First = Digest_Index_T'First and
#     Digest_Length <= Digest'Length and
#     Key_Length <= Key'Length and
#     Message_First in Message'Range and
#     Message_Last <= Message'Last;

subprograms.name: Incorporate
subprograms.code:
procedure Incorporate (Context : in out T;
                       Message : in     Octet_Arrays.T)

subprograms.name: Incorporate_Flex

documentation.description:
! rule on Parameter_Rule
# derives Context from *,
#                      Message,
#                      Message_First,
#                      Message_Last;
# pre Message_First in Message'Range and
#     Message_Last <= Message'Last;

subprograms.name: Initial
subprograms.code: function Initial (Digest_Length : in Digest_Index_T) return T

subprograms.name: Initial_Keyed
subprograms.code:
function Initial_Keyed (Digest_Length : in Digest_Index_T;
                        Key           : in Key_T) return T

subprograms.name: Initial_Keyed_Flex

documentation.description:
# pre Key_Length <= Key'Length;
# return Context => Digest_Length_Of (Context) = Digest_Length;

subprograms.name: Is_Overflowed
subprograms.code: function Is_Overflowed (Context : in T) return Boolean
